metadata.description: planfi skills — financial planning and real-estate investment analysis powered by the public planfi MCP.

plugins.name: str-investment-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze short-term-rental (Airbnb/VRBO) property investments by city: cash flow, cash-on-cash, cap rate, break-even occupancy, and a hold-period return for the horizon you pick. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: financial-forecast
plugins.description: Build a complete FIRE / financial forecast: net-worth projection, FIRE age, Monte Carlo success rate, insights, action plan, and what-if scenario comparisons. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.
